content.en:
Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor approached this black mountain range, and those sleeping Lost Behemoths gradually woke up, and the strength of one of the Lost Behemoths was even more comparable to the top-notch second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Roar!!!!

After these lost beasts woke up, they roared at Ye Tian and them, and immediately killed them.

Ye Tian didn't make a move, but the Blood Ancestor did.

I saw that the Bloody Great Ancestor released blood-colored silk threads, which easily penetrated one Lost Giant Beast after another, and then these Lost Giant Beasts were bound by the blood-colored silk threads, shrunk one by one, and entered the mouth of the Bloody Great Ancestor.

In the blink of an eye, these lost behemoths were reduced to the rations of the Blood Ancestor.

"It tastes good!"

The Blood Ancestor said with a smile.

"Blood Ancestor, eating these Lost Behemoths won't improve your strength. Ye Tian said.

The Raccoon Blood Ancestor hurriedly said, "It's just a habit!"

"If you eat this kind of cultivation creature indiscriminately, it will be easy to offend many forces, and sooner or later something will happen!" Ye Tian reminded.

"Yes, I'll pay attention!"

The Bloody Great Ancestor replied again and again.

"Where's the passage?"

Ye Tian sensed a circle, but still didn't perceive the existence of the channel.

"Wait a minute!" the Blood Ancestor pulled out a token.

This token contains the power of the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, and when activated, it can trigger the seal here.

Airplanes!!!!

The seals in this area were triggered, and the Blood Ancestor made one seal after another, and with the power of the token, a passage was finally revealed.

A gray crack stretched across the mountains, a passage into the Infinite Ruins.

"Come on in, I won't be able to last long!"

The Blood Ancestor said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor escaped directly into it, passed through this crack, and entered the Infinite Realm Ruins.

And just after the Blood Ancestor entered, this crack disappeared.

......

Immeasurable Ruins.

Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor came here, and as soon as they came here, they activated the power of the ruins, and a gray power protected their whole bodies.

In doing so, they reduce the chance of being spotted by a large number of Immeasurable Ruins.

However, the environment of the Infinite Boundary Ruins is really harsh.

Even the top third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, after entering here at this moment, its strength was greatly suppressed.

"Let's go, the place where the Infinite Realm Beast fell is not far from here, let's speed up!"

The Blood Ancestor urged.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian directly pulled the Raccoon Blood Ancestor to speed up.

In the immeasurable realm ruins, he could not travel through time and space, he could only fly, Ye Tian's speed was many times faster than that of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, so it was Ye Tian who flew with the Raccoon Blood Ancestor.

Time passed slowly, and suddenly, an immeasurable ruin monster appeared in their path.

"Endless Great Ancestor, you have to kill this immeasurable ruin monster immediately, otherwise more and more immeasurable ruin monsters will come. The perception of these Infinite Ruins in the Infinite Realm Ruins is many times stronger than ours, even if they are shielded by ruins, they will be discovered at close range!"

After all, he only has one life, so he cherishes it very much.

Ye Tian instantly shot out and killed this immeasurable ruin monster with a single blow of his truncated finger.

Immediately, he quickly left.

......

"It's here!"

The Great Ancestor of the Blood.

At this time, Ye Tian saw a gray world, standing in the immeasurable ruins.

"This world is the world that the Infinite Realm Beast turned into after the fall, and there should be a lot of Infinite Ruins in it. After we enter, we will definitely encounter a large number of attacks from the Infinite Rui Monsters, and we can only rely on you, the Endless Great Ancestor! You are responsible for resisting these Infinite Rui Monsters, and I am responsible for finding the Infinite Blood Golden Stone!" The Bloody Great Ancestor arranged.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Whew!!

Ye Tian and the Raccoon Blood Ancestor escaped into this world, and as soon as they entered this world, they sensed the immeasurable ruin monsters.

It had become a lair of the Infinite Ruins, and its number had reached a terrifying number.

In other words, in the Xuanqi Realm, this is a large number of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and they are comparable to high-level immeasurable lifeforms above the third stage.

If you don't have the combat power of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, I'm afraid you won't even be able to hold up the time to breathe when you enter here, and you will be bombarded and killed.

Thundered!!!!

A Boundless Ruin Monster was killed, and a terrifying aura permeated the surroundings, making the Blood Ancestor shiver.

Although the strength of most of the Infinite Ruins is only comparable to the average third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, there are a lot of them, and the strength of a few immeasurable ruins is also comparable to the top-level third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

The Blood Ancestor even sensed a few immeasurable ruin monsters whose strength was no less than his own, if it weren't for Ye Tian, he wouldn't have been able to hold up for a few moments at all.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian erupted, showing the Taihao Infinite Body of the Dacheng Realm, and immediately cast a crippled Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, the Wuheng Sword.

This Infinite Extreme Domain Technique is also the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique he practiced in the Ruins Stone Tower, although the power is weaker, but it is better because the power consumed is less, and it is suitable for group attacks.

Airplanes!!!!

The dense sword rays tore through the surrounding void, piercing and killing a powerful immeasurable ruin monster.

Seeing this scene, the Blood Ancestor couldn't help but be shocked by Ye Tian's terrifying strength.

He is also a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and his strength is simply not worth mentioning.

"The strength of the Endless Great Ancestor has become stronger again, even more powerful than the rumors, I know that the strength of the Junshan Great Ancestor is far less than this level. Sure enough, the Endless Great Ancestor's injuries recovered, or a clone was refined. Moreover, his strength has gone further, and he is now much more powerful than the ordinary fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

The Blood Ancestor was glad that he had found the right person, and with Ye Tian's help, he would definitely be able to collect the immeasurable blood gold stones here this time.

Now it's just a matter of seeing how many immeasurable blood gems there are, and there are a lot of hopes.

Of course, they also have to fight quickly, no one knows what will happen in the immeasurable ruins, and they must not stay here for long, otherwise something will happen.

"Blood Ancestor, let's look for the immeasurable blood gold stone!"

Ye Tian urged.

"Good!"

The Blood Ancestor began to cast a secret technique that could help him sense the breath of the immeasurable Blood Stone.

Time passed in seconds, and it didn't take long for the Bloody Ancestor to look overjoyed.

"I sensed it, and that direction gave birth to an immeasurable blood gold stone!"

The Blood Ancestor said excitedly.

"Okay, I'll take you there!"

While Ye Tian was fighting with the immeasurable ruin monsters around him, he quickly flew away with the Raccoon Blood Ancestor to the location that the Raccoon Blood Ancestor said.
